info.title: AviationWeather Data API
info.description: This API provides machine-to-machine access to aviation weather data, including METARs, TAFs, AIRMETs, and SIGMETs. It enables users to fetch up-to-date weather information for flight planning and operations. The service allows queries for the past 15 days of data and provides cache options for efficient data retrieval.

get.description: Retrieve terminal weather observations (METARs) for specified stations. Supports queries for the past 15 days.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of ICAO station identifiers (e.g., KMCI,KSFO)

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve terminal aerodrome forecasts (TAFs) for specified stations. Supports queries for the past 15 days.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of ICAO station identifiers

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve pilot and aircraft reports. Primarily covers US and North Atlantic regions.

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available
No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve aviation advisories (G-AIRMETs) for contiguous 48 United States. G-AIRMETs replaced CONUS text AIRMETs in January 2025.

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve Center Weather Advisories (CWAs) for the United States.

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve TFM Convective Forecast for United States and portions of Canada.

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Retrieve weather observation station information worldwide.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of ICAO station identifiers

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of ICAO airport identifiers

204.description: No content - valid request but no data available

get.description: Download compressed XML file containing all current METAR observations. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed CSV file containing all current METAR observations. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed XML file containing all current TAF forecasts. Updated every 10 minutes.
Download compressed XML file containing all current CONUS SIGMET warnings. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed CSV file containing all current CONUS SIGMET warnings. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed XML file containing all current CONUS G-AIRMET advisories. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed XML file containing all current aircraft and pilot reports. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed CSV file containing all current aircraft and pilot reports. Updated once per minute.
Download compressed XML file containing complete stations listing. Updated once per day.
Download compressed JSON file containing complete stations listing. Updated once per day.

altim.description: Altimeter setting in inches of mercury

cover.description: Cloud coverage (SKC, FEW, SCT, BKN, OVC)

issueTime.description: TAF issue time in ISO8601 format

validTimeFrom.description: Valid time from in ISO8601 format

validTimeTo.description: Valid time to in ISO8601 format

properties.description: Feature properties specific to each product type

coordinates.description: Coordinate array structure depends on geometry type

BadRequest.description: Invalid request - invalid or missing parameters

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded - maximum 100 requests per minute

InternalServerError.description: Internal server error - request may be valid but system unable to serve it

x-ratelimit.description: Maximum 100 requests per minute. All API endpoints should not be consumed more frequently than 1 request/min per thread.

x-max-results.description: Most endpoints return a maximum of 400 entries. Consider using cache files for larger requests.
